message:
fix(ci): add version field for golangci-lint v2 compatibility

golangci-lint v2 requires a version field in the configuration file.
Added version: "2" to fix the config validation error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 # golangci-lint configuration for slb
 # https://golangci-lint.run/usage/configuration/
+version: "2"
 
 run:
   timeout: 5m
